matches.x: AND YE MURMURED. Va-teragenu (and ye murmured) is similar to rogenim (murmur) in And they that murmur shall learn instruction (Is. 29:24). Teragenu (murmured) is in the nifal. Compare, al te’atzevu67Which is in the nifal. (be not grieved).

Having rehearsed the sufferings of the children of Israel during their wilderness wanderings, the Apostle Paul wrote: "Now all these things happened unto them for ensamples: and they are written for our admonition, upon whom the ends of the world are come" (1 Corinthians 10:11). Such obviously is the Lord's purpose in the preservation of the kind of story being presently told in Mosiah.…
